description: Registry of retryable error patterns for provider-connect-retry plugin

errors.description: LLM SSE stream read timeout — transient network/provider issue
Provider connection failure — original hardcoded error from provider-connect-retry.mjs
Provider backend rate throttle — transient capacity issue, not a Google API error
GLM API parameter validation error — transient Z.AI API issue, retry before falling back to Kimi

errors.pattern: ^(?!.*messages parameter is illegal).*please check the documentation
errors.description: GLM documentation-check error variant — retries generic doc-check failures but explicitly excludes deterministic 'messages parameter is illegal' request errors
Generic server errors from any provider — retry with backoff before falling back to Kimi

sisyphus: Proceed with the execution of the plan NOW. Give me response.
Continue working on the current task. Follow your todos and produce output.
You were in the middle of work. Resume immediately — check your todo list and act on the next item.
RESPOND NOW. Review the conversation above, find where you left off, and continue from there.
This is your final retry. Execute the next step of your plan immediately. Do not output an empty response.
atlas: Continue with the execution of the plan please, following the last executed steps, todos or plans.
Proceed with your work. Check what was done so far and move to the next step.
Resume the task. Look at the todos, find the next incomplete item, and execute it now.
You must respond with actual content. Review the plan and continue working on the next pending task.
FINAL ATTEMPT — respond immediately. Check your todos and plans, then execute the next action step.
default: Proceed now. Use the current context and respond directly.
Resume working. Check what needs to be done next and do it.
You need to respond with content. Review the context above and continue.
FINAL RETRY — you must produce a response now. Review everything and act.

errors.description: Empty response / zero tokens / finish reason 'other' — sends escalating nudge prompts to break the model out of stall before falling back
Provider response headers timeout — provider did not send initial response headers within configured headerTimeout window. Fired by OpenCode's custom fetch wrapper (provider.ts timeoutController).

Z.AI Coding Plan per-minute rate limit on GLM models — immediately fall back to gpt-5.5 (1M context) without retrying the same rate-limited GLM call. Retrying the same model hangs in promptAsync while the failed assistant is still active.

errors.pattern: (?:exceeded model token limit|request exceeded model token limit|tokens in request more than max)
errors.description: Request size exceeds the current model's context window (e.g., 262144 limit on Kimi). Immediately fall back to gpt-5.5 (1M context) so the session can continue while OpenCode/OMO context management compacts or prunes history.
